torch_pattern: beta = 0.5; eps = -1e-6; pos_part = alpha_p * x * x + beta * x; x_clipped = torch.minimum(x, torch.full_like(x, eps)); neg_part = alpha_n * torch.expm1(x_clipped) - alpha_n * x + beta * x; out = torch.where(x > 0, pos_part, neg_part)
weight_transform: none (alpha_p and alpha_n are scalar trainable parameters passed by value; if stored as nn.Parameter, extract scalar via .item() before lowering)
applicability_notes: xIELU piecewise activation (arXiv:2411.13010). Golden computes in float32 when input is bfloat16 and casts back once; bf16 accuracy validated within 1 ULP, fp32 within rtol=6e-05/atol=1e-06.

placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.from_torch(torch_input, dtype=ttnn_dtype, layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device) with no explicit memory_config (defaults to DRAM interleaved)
